title: the-flow flight plan
$comment: REFERENCE-ONLY / standardisation doc. the-flow hand-cranks the JSON by inference and self-checks against this shape; there is NO runtime validator (first-class flight-plan tooling is out of scope this plan — workshop 002 Q1 deferred only the validator, not this schema file). Mirrors references/flight-plan.template.json and the field tables in workshops/002-flight-plan-dag.md § JSON contract. references/sample-the-flow.json must validate against this.

cursor.description: id of the current node (exactly one)

next.description: next label; omit when multiple options (narration lists them)

agents.description: parallel minih agents running alongside the flow (companions + workers). the-flow records them; it does not run minih.

status.description: done=ran/accepted (green) · in_progress=running now (orange) · blocked=hit a wall (red) · known=designed future (blue-grey) · assumed=speculative future (dashed grey)

id.description: stable short id (spec, p3, dr, fx3)

type.description: each workshop is its OWN workshop node (never collapsed)

next.description: downstream node ids (DAG edges); [] for terminal

command.description: the /plan-* or tool command this node runs

ran_at.description: ISO timestamp when executed (adoption: artifact mtime, best-effort)

user_input.description: VERBATIM user words that drove this step (audit → 🗣 bubble)

reconstructed.description: true when user_input/ran_at were back-filled by adoption rather than captured live

artifacts.description: repo-relative paths this node produced/links (*-spec.md, tasks/.../execution.log.md, reviews/*.md, plan folder)

branch_of.description: for excursions: the spine node id it hangs off

tool.description: for type:deep-research — perplexity | harness | … (tool of choice)

kind.description: companion=watches/advisory (wraps its phases) · worker=does a slice in parallel (side-node)

covers.description: node ids the agent spans (companion wraps these; worker builds into them)

render.description: wrap=companion subgraph around covers[] · side=worker side-node into covers[] (defaults from kind)

driver.description: the skill that runs it (e.g. /plan-6-v2-implement-phase-companion); blank if user minih-ran it ad-hoc

note.description: role / what it watches or builds
